text: I'm probably fine, but I've been feeling off and wanted to be sure.
label: migraine/discharge

text: Mild fatigue, thought it worth a quick check.
label: non-infectious

text: Persistent cough with mucus and mild chest discomfort. Started 4 day(s) ago, and I'm getting worse, not better. I can't catch my breath.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 2 day(s) — nothing terrible yet, and it's been the same for a while now.
label: influenza/mild

text: I feel like something might be wrong — I can't put my finger on it.
label: common_cold/discharge

text: Productive cough and slightly short of breath climbing stairs. 16 day(s) like this, though it seems to be slowly resolving. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Slight fever, some body aches, scratchy throat. Probably flu starting, 3 day(s).
label: influenza/mild

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 11 day(s) in.
label: influenza/moderate

text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 8 day(s) — nothing terrible yet. I'm burning up.
label: influenza/mild

text: Cough with some yellowish mucus and a dull chest ache for 4 day(s). Breathing is very laboured.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: High fever, bad body aches, shivering, exhausted. Classic flu, but quite rough — 10 day(s), and it feels like it might be turning a corner. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Worsening chest cough with thick mucus, feverish, and quite short of breath. 9 day(s).
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Persistent cough with mucus and mild chest discomfort. Started 10 day(s) ago, though it seems to be slowly resolving.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: My breathing is really laboured. Chest pain, high fever, can't stop coughing up phlegm. 8 day(s), deteriorating, and I feel more unwell than yesterday.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Cough with some yellowish mucus and a dull chest ache for 1 day(s), and it's been the same for a while now.
label: influenza/mild

text: I haven't been sleeping great and feel a bit run-down.
label: migraine/discharge

text: Coughing a lot, bringing up darker mucus, feverish, noticeably short of breath. 9 day(s). I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I can't breathe properly. Severe chest pain, coughing up greenish phlegm, high temperature. 8 day(s) and scared. I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: It hit me fast — fever, chills, splitting headache, muscle pain everywhere. Been in bed 6 day(s).
label: influenza/moderate

text: Fever on and off, drenched in sweat, can't get out of bed. This has gone on 3 day(s), and I'm really worried because it's getting worse.
label: influenza/mild

text: I have a chesty cough with a bit of phlegm and some tightness in my chest. 17 day(s) now, though it seems to be slowly resolving. I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/moderate
